text.title: Reranking API Services
text.summary: Cohere, Jina, Voyage AI, and LLM-based reranking code examples with service-specific rules.

rule.statement: Cohere reranker accepts up to 1000 documents per request and enforces a 10K total character limit; truncate or pre-filter beyond these limits.
rule.rationale: Exceeding the document count or character limit raises a 400 error. Pre-filter to top-50 ANN candidates before calling the reranker.

example.note: Jina v2 supports multilingual; use for non-English corpora where Cohere English model degrades.

rule.statement: Reserve LLM reranking for offline or low-QPS workflows; at 500-2000ms per call it is not viable for real-time search.
rule.rationale: GPT-4o scoring runs an LLM completion per rerank call. At >1 QPS the cost and latency are prohibitive compared to a local cross-encoder at 20-50ms.
